episodes.title: We Accidentally Almost Joined a Cult for a Day | Episode 17
episodes.description:
Episode 17 out now! Join Lily and Jenn as they explore the world of cults. Well, one in particular almost got them to join, Jenn just had to cut her hair first. They discuss their close encounter with a cult and almost joining it for a day. As well, as pondering what else could be considered a cult. We hope you enjoy this ADHD episode because they get off topic a few times.

Here is a link to the video we watched about the Twelve Tribes Cult: https://youtu.be/zJyaSEX-rQI?si=e9ANECX8q5yThDtL
